name: Jack Daniel's Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the JACK DANIEL'S WHISKEY, SOY SAUCE, DIJON-STYLE MUSTARD, minced GREEN ONIONS, LT. BROWN SUGAR (packed), 1 tsp of SALT, and 1 dash of WORCESTERSHIRE SAUCE.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Use the marinade to marinate shrimp or scallops for at least 1 hour, or beef, chicken, or pork in the refrigerator overnight.
4. When grilling or broiling the shellfish or meat, use the marinade as a basting sauce.
